name: Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup honey (or use molasses - it's good too!)
3/4 cup skim, soy or rice milk, or water
recipeInstructions: Sift together corn meal, flour, baking powder and salt. Add remaining ingredients; mix well with a spoon. Pour into a 9-inch round teflon baking dish (or spray a 9-inch round glass baking dish with "oil & flour" non-stick spray). Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
